name: Pushwoosh Messages API
description: The Pushwoosh Messages API enables creating, managing, and tracking push notifications. It supports multi-platform push delivery (iOS, Android, Web, etc.) with rich customization options including templates, targeting, scheduling, and platform-specific parameters.
